texto: Far too many people on the spectrum spend most of their days with people who carry around memories of, and are often too overwhelmed by incidents of, prior misinterpretation. This is no fun. In travel you can start over, and reinvent yourself. If somehow a relationship gets weird, you can leave and go to the next town, the next block, or whatever the case may be, and try again.
explicacao: Citação de Michael John Carley sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “Far too many people on the spectrum spend most of their days with people who carry around memorie…” articula autoestima, aspergers, vida em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como viagem e termino.

This is no fun. In travel you can start over, and reinvent yourself. If somehow a relationship gets weird, you can leave and go to the next town, the next block, or whatever the case may be, and try again.

texto: Traveling in other countries is especially fun because others often attribute your differences to the less-stigmatizing idea that you're like this only because you're a foreigner.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Michael John Carley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a vida. O trecho “Traveling in other countries is especially fun because others often attribute your differences to…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, aspergers, travel pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e vida.
